title: Signup with valid credentials returns access token and user
steps: Send POST /api/auth/signup with valid email, name, and password
Verify response body contains access_token (string) and user object
Verify user object contains id, email, name, role fields
expected_result: 201 Created with { access_token: string, user: { id, email, name, role } } and Set-Cookie: refresh_token

title: Signup with duplicate email returns 409 Conflict
preconditions: User with that email already exists
steps: Send POST /api/auth/signup with email that already exists in database
Verify response body contains error message about email already in use
expected_result: 409 Conflict with { message: 'Email already in use' }

title: Signup with missing required fields returns 400
steps: Verify response body contains validation error messages
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with validation error messages for email, name, password

title: Signup with invalid email format returns 400
steps: Verify error message references invalid email format
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with email validation error

title: Signup with password shorter than 6 chars returns 400
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with password minLength validation error

title: Signup with name shorter than 2 chars returns 400
steps: Verify error references name minLength constraint
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with name minLength validation error

title: Login with valid credentials returns access token
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password
Verify response body contains access_token, refresh_token, and user object
expected_result: 200 OK with { access_token: string, refresh_token: string, user: { id, email, name, role } }

title: Login with wrong password returns 401
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with correct email but wrong password
Verify response body contains 'Invalid credentials' message
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized with { message: 'Invalid credentials' }

title: Login with non-existent email returns 401
preconditions: Email does not exist in database
steps: Send POST /api/auth/login with email that does not exist
Verify response does not reveal whether email exists
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized with generic invalid credentials message

title: Login with invalid email format returns 400
steps: Verify error references email format constraint
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with email validation error

title: Login with empty body returns 400
steps: Verify response contains validation errors for email and password
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with validation error messages

title: GET /auth/me with valid JWT returns authenticated user
steps: Verify response body contains user object with id, email, name, role
expected_result: 200 OK with { user: { id, email, name, role } }

title: GET /auth/me without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: GET /auth/me with malformed JWT returns 401
steps: Send GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer not-a-real-token
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Token refresh with valid refresh cookie returns new access token
preconditions: Valid refresh_token cookie set from prior login
steps: Verify response body contains new access_token and user
Verify new Set-Cookie refresh_token is issued
expected_result: 200 OK with { access_token: string, user: object } and new Set-Cookie refresh_token

title: Token refresh without cookie returns 401
steps: Verify response contains 'Refresh token is missing'
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized with { message: 'Refresh token is missing' }

title: Token refresh with tampered token returns 401
steps: Verify response contains invalid token error
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized with token invalid message

title: Logout with valid refresh cookie clears session
preconditions: User is logged in with refresh_token cookie set
steps: Verify response body is { success: true }
expected_result: 200 OK with { success: true } and Set-Cookie clears refresh_token

title: Logout without cookie still returns 200 (graceful degradation)
steps: Verify response body is { success: true } (no error thrown)
expected_result: 200 OK with { success: true }

title: GET /models returns array of model objects without auth
steps: Send GET /api/models without any Authorization header
Verify each model has id, name/label fields
expected_result: 200 OK with array of model objects

title: GET /models with type filter returns filtered results
steps: Verify all returned models match the requested type
expected_result: 200 OK with filtered model array

title: GET /models with lab filter returns filtered results
steps: Verify all returned models belong to the specified lab
expected_result: 200 OK with models filtered by lab

title: GET /models with search query returns matching results
steps: Verify returned models match the search term
expected_result: 200 OK with models matching search term

title: GET /models/:id with valid ID returns single model
steps: Fetch model list to get a valid ID
Verify response is a single model object with matching id
expected_result: 200 OK with single model object

title: GET /models/:id with non-existent ID returns 404
expected_result: 404 Not Found

title: Guest user sends message and receives AI reply
steps: Send POST /api/chat/send with valid message and modelId, no Authorization
Include X-Session-Id header with a UUID
Verify response contains reply, modelId, sessionId, timestamp, and session
expected_result: 200 OK with { reply: string, modelId, sessionId, timestamp, session }

title: Authenticated user sends message and receives AI reply
preconditions: Valid JWT token for authenticated user
expected_result: 200 OK with { reply, modelId, sessionId, session } where session.isGuest = false

title: Chat send with empty message returns 400
steps: Verify validation error references message minLength
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with message minLength validation error

title: Chat send without modelId returns 400
steps: Send POST /api/chat/send with message but no modelId
Verify validation error references missing modelId
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with modelId validation error

title: Chat send with message exceeding 10000 chars returns 400
steps: Send POST /api/chat/send with message of 10001 characters
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with message maxLength validation error

title: Chat send with sessionId continues existing guest session
preconditions: A guest session was previously created
steps: Send first message to get a sessionId
Send second POST /api/chat/send with same sessionId in body
Verify response sessionId matches the first response sessionId
Verify session messages array has 4 entries (2 user + 2 assistant)
expected_result: 200 OK with same sessionId and session.messages.length = 4

title: Chat send with invalid type enum value returns 400
steps: Verify validation error references invalid enum value for type
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with enum validation error for type field

title: Authenticated user creates a new chat session
steps: Verify response contains sessionId and session object
expected_result: 201 Created with { sessionId: string, session: object }

title: Create session without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Authenticated user retrieves their own session
preconditions: Session exists for the authenticated user
steps: Verify response contains correct session data
expected_result: 200 OK with session object

title: GET session owned by another user returns 404
preconditions: Session belongs to user A; request made by user B
steps: Send GET /api/chat/session/{userA_session_id} with user B's JWT
Verify response contains 'Session not found or access denied'
expected_result: 404 Not Found with access denied message

title: GET session without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Authenticated user deletes their own session
preconditions: Session exists for the authenticated user
steps: Verify response body is { success: true }
Verify subsequent GET on same session returns 404
expected_result: 200 OK with { success: true }

title: DELETE session owned by another user returns 404
steps: Send DELETE /api/chat/session/{userA_session_id} with user B's JWT
expected_result: 404 Not Found

title: DELETE session without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Authenticated user retrieves paginated chat history
preconditions: User has at least one chat session
steps: Verify response contains { data: array, total, page, limit, totalPages }
expected_result: 200 OK with { data: [], total: number, page: 1, limit: 20, totalPages: number }

title: Chat history without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Authenticated user retrieves dashboard stats
steps: Verify response contains totalRequests, totalMessages, avgLatency, cost, modelUsage, activeSessions
expected_result: 200 OK with { totalRequests, totalMessages, avgLatency, cost, modelUsage, activeSessions }

title: Dashboard stats without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Authenticated user retrieves dashboard history with pagination
steps: Verify response contains data, total, page, limit, totalPages
expected_result: 200 OK with paginated history response

title: Authenticated user retrieves billing information
steps: Verify response contains plan, status, billingCycle, nextBillingDate, usage, cost, invoices
expected_result: 200 OK with { plan, status, billingCycle, nextBillingDate, usage, cost, invoices }

title: Billing without JWT returns 401
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

title: Contact form submission with valid data returns success
steps: Send POST /api/forms/contact with valid name, email, message
Verify response body contains { success: true, message: string }

test_data.name: Jane Doe
test_data.message: I would like to learn more about your pricing plans.

expected_result: 200 OK with { success: true, message: 'Thank you for contacting us!...' }

title: Contact form with missing fields returns 400
steps: Verify validation errors for name, email, message
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with validation errors for all required fields

title: Contact form message shorter than 10 chars returns 400
steps: Verify error references message minLength of 10
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with message minLength validation error

title: Contact form message exceeding 2000 chars returns 400
steps: Send POST /api/forms/contact with message of 2001 characters
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with message maxLength validation error

title: Feedback form submission with valid data returns success
steps: Send POST /api/forms/feedback with rating=5, message='Great platform experience', page='/home'
Verify response body is { success: true, message: string }
expected_result: 200 OK with { success: true, message: 'Thank you for your feedback!' }

title: Feedback form with rating below 1 returns 400
steps: Verify error references rating Min(1) constraint
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with rating min constraint error

title: Feedback form with rating above 5 returns 400
steps: Verify error references rating Max(5) constraint
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with rating max constraint error

title: Feedback form with missing required fields returns 400
steps: Verify errors for rating and message fields
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with validation errors

title: Upload valid image file returns file info
preconditions: Backend running with uploads/ directory writable
steps: Send POST /api/upload with multipart/form-data containing a valid JPEG file
Verify response contains url, filename, size, type
expected_result: 200 OK with { url, filename, size, type }

title: Upload without file returns 400
steps: Send POST /api/upload with empty multipart body (no file field)
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with { message: 'No file provided' }

title: Upload with disallowed MIME type returns 400
steps: Verify response contains file type not allowed message
expected_result: 400 Bad Request with file type not allowed message

title: Upload file exceeding 50MB returns error
steps: Send POST /api/upload with a file larger than 50MB
Verify response contains file size limit message
expected_result: 413 Payload Too Large or 400 Bad Request with file size limit error

title: Login endpoint responds within 500ms threshold
preconditions: User exists in database; backend running
steps: Record total response time from request dispatch to full response
expected_result: Response within 500ms with 200 OK

title: Chat send responds within 2000ms in MOCK_AI mode
expected_result: Response within 2000ms with 200 OK

title: Models list endpoint responds within 1000ms
expected_result: Response within 1000ms with 200 OK

title: Signup endpoint responds within 500ms
steps: Send POST /api/auth/signup with new valid user data
expected_result: Response within 500ms

title: Dashboard stats endpoint responds within 1000ms
expected_result: Response within 1000ms with 200 OK

title: Signup response schema must not expose password hash
steps: Verify response contains access_token (string) and user (object)
Verify user object has: id, email, name, role
Verify response does NOT contain password, passwordHash, or refreshTokenHash
expected_result: Response matches { access_token: string, user: { id, email, name, role } } with no password field

title: Login response schema and no sensitive data leakage
steps: Verify response shape: { access_token, refresh_token, user: { id, email, name, role } }
Verify no password hash or refreshTokenHash in response
expected_result: Response shape validated; no sensitive data leakage

title: Chat send response schema contains all required fields
steps: Verify response contains: reply (string), modelId, sessionId, timestamp (ISO string), session (object)
Verify session contains: id, modelId, title, isGuest, messages array, createdAt, updatedAt
expected_result: Full chat send schema validated with all required fields present

title: Models list endpoint is public and requires no auth
steps: Send GET /api/models without any Authorization header
Verify response is accessible without authentication
expected_result: 200 OK without requiring Authorization header

title: Guest user sends message without any session ID — session auto-created
steps: Send POST /api/chat/send with no X-Session-Id header and no sessionId in body
Verify a new sessionId is auto-created and returned
Verify session.isGuest = true in returned session
expected_result: 200 OK with auto-created guest sessionId; session.isGuest = true

title: Authenticated user cannot hijack another user session via send
preconditions: User A session exists; request made as user B
steps: Send POST /api/chat/send with sessionId from user A while authenticated as user B
Verify a new session is created for user B
Verify response sessionId is different from user A's sessionId
expected_result: 200 OK but with user B's new session; user A's session not reused
